bug_report.summary: Table context menu row submenu (“Zeile”) does not expand to reveal items (cannot verify “Zeile löschen”)
steps_to_reproduce: Create/open a note containing a Markdown table.
Right-click inside a table cell to open the table context menu.
Click the “Zeile” (Row) menu entry to expand its submenu.
expected_behaviors: A submenu/flyout should open for “Zeile”, showing row actions including “Zeile löschen” (Delete row).
actual_behaviors: Before-change: no table context menu/submenu is visible at this step.
After-change: the table context menu is visible and “Zeile” is highlighted, but no submenu/flyout opens, so “Zeile löschen” is not shown/accessible in the captured state.
